cn_title: 《雷曼：起源》增强版遭泄露，育碧经典重制细节曝光
subtitle: 4K/60帧重制，Xbox商店标价离谱的1999美元
opus_summary: 育碧尚未公布的《雷曼：起源增强版》在Xbox商店意外曝光后被紧急下架。泄露页面显示本作将支持4K分辨率、60帧及现代化改进，并包含此前仅在PS Vita版中出现的60个隐藏圣物。商店标价1999美元几乎肯定是占位符错误。这是继本周早些时候《雷曼：传奇重制版》泄露后，雷曼系列的又一次信息泄露。《雷曼：起源》2011年首发时获得IGN 9.5/10高分评价。

pending_dict.note: 育碧经典平台跳跃游戏系列

paragraphs.en: Ubisoft seems to have another leak problem, as what appears to be a remastered version of Rayman Origins has appeared on the Xbox Store – and it's only $2,000.
paragraphs.cn: 育碧似乎又出现了泄露问题——一款疑似《雷曼：起源》重制版的游戏出现在了Xbox商店上，标价仅需2000美元（约合人民币13580元）。

paragraphs.en: Nintendo Everything caught and shared a Microsoft listing for an unannounced game called Rayman Origins: Enhanced Edition before it was pulled offline yesterday. Along with a few screenshots, the page revealed the promise of 4K resolution, 60fps, and modern enhancements.
paragraphs.cn: Nintendo Everything在一款名为《雷曼：起源增强版》的未公布游戏页面被下架前截获并分享了信息。页面除了几张截图外，还透露了4K分辨率、60帧及现代化改进等特性。

paragraphs.en: Although there may be some fans willing to pay the $1,999 for Ubisoft's classic platformer, the price tag is almost certainly an error or placeholder number. Considering the page has been taken down, we'll probably see a corrected price when an official announcement eventually arrives.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然可能有粉丝愿意为育碧这款经典平台跳跃游戏支付1999美元（约合人民币13573元），但这个价格几乎可以确定是错误或占位符。考虑到页面已被下架，我们可能要等到正式公布时才能看到修正后的价格。

paragraphs.en: Rayman Origins brought the floating mascot back to the world 2D gameplay when it launched in 2011 for the Nintendo Wii, PlayStation 3, and Xbox 360. Although PC, PlayStation Vita, and Nintendo 3DS versions rolled out in the years that followed, the title has remained a bit stuck when it comes to its presence on consoles.
paragraphs.cn: 《雷曼：起源》于2011年在Wii、PS3和Xbox 360上发售，让这位飘浮的吉祥物回归了2D游戏世界。尽管随后几年推出了PC、PS Vita和3DS版本，但这款游戏在现代主机上一直缺席。

paragraphs.en: Elsewhere in the leaked description for Rayman Origins: Enhanced Edition is the mention of "60 hidden Relics," which were previously only available on the Vita version of the game. Potential platforms remain a mystery, but should Ubisoft announce Rayman Origins: Enhanced Edition, there's a good chance players with modern hardware will get to relive the classic 15 years after its original release.
paragraphs.cn: 泄露描述中还提到了「60个隐藏圣物」——这些内容此前仅在PS Vita版中出现。潜在登陆平台尚不明确，但如果育碧正式公布《雷曼：起源增强版》，现代主机玩家很可能将在原版发售15年后重温这款经典。

paragraphs.en: The Rayman Origins leak follows another slip-up for the character from that saw first details about the unannounced Rayman Legends Retold tumble onto the internet earlier this week. This title is said to be a remake of Ubisoft's 2013 video game and is expected to launch this October.
paragraphs.cn: 《雷曼：起源》的泄露紧随本周早些时候的另一次失误——未公布的《雷曼：传奇重制版》的首批细节同样流出。据称该作是育碧2013年游戏的完全重制版，预计今年十月发售。

paragraphs.en: For now, we do not know how the publisher plans to address Rayman Origins: Enhanced Edition or when it may release. With events like Summer Game Fest just around the corner and more leaks popping up every day, we can only hope to hear an update soon.
paragraphs.cn: 目前我们尚不清楚发行商计划如何处理《雷曼：起源增强版》或其发售时间。随着Summer Game Fest等活动临近、泄露消息层出不穷，我们只能期待尽快获得官方更新。
